docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-10-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WILLIAM CENDAK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT JERRY CALDWELL IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT: PLAINTIFF GAVE A CASH PAYMENT OF $2700 IN OPEN COURT TO THE DEFENDANT; DEFENDANT WILL HAVE PLAINTIFF'S TRUCK READY TO BE TOWED BY 4PM ON APR-20 WITH BOTH ENGINES AND PARTS. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MAY-10-2022 HEARING IF TOW DID NOT OCCUR. ****ZOOM APPEARANCES ARE GRANTED TO BOTH PARTIES IF APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED.**** IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASES WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS (LEFT) RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY CENDAK, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT CALDWELL, JERRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL **GRANTED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-02-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE TO CURE SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2022 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO APR-19-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WILLIAM CENDAK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT JERRY CALDWELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT SERVED CROSS CLAIM ON PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT IN THE HALL. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WILL NOT WAIVE, REQUESTS TIME TO PREPARE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
